episodes.title: Through the Eyes of UFO Cult of Universe People
episodes.description:
A dive into one of the strangest cults of the 90s-2000s there is. "Is", not "was". 
Remembering them a while ago, my curiosity got the best of me and I just had to dig a little deeper. Because to this day, Universe People, also known as Heavenly Angels or Cosmic People of Light Powers are out there. And so are, according to them, the dangers to us all.


Disclaimer: This is not an endorsement. I am not affiliated with the Universe People in any way. 

Image of Erich Von Däniken by Michal Maňas (CC by 3.0)
Image of Michael Hesseman by Thaler Tamas (CC by 4.0)
Footage of the seminar by @IvanNovakov
Image of Applewhite is from Heaven's gate initiation video.
